title: Throwable
description: Throwable item component. Throwable items, such as a snowball

do_swing_animation.description: Whether the item should use the swing animation when thrown

launch_power_scale.description: The scale at which the power of the throw increases

max_draw_duration.description: The maximum duration to draw a throwable item

max_launch_power.description: The maximum power to launch the throwable item

min_draw_duration.description: The minimum duration to draw a throwable item

scale_power_by_draw_duration.description: Whether or not the power of the throw increases with duration charged
